title: Daewoo Wet and Dry Multi Grinder for Coffee, Nuts, Spices with Safety Lock, Non-Slip Feet, Viewing Window, Stainless-Steel Housing and Blades, Compact Coffee Grinder
features: WET & DRY GRINDER – Versatile grinder that seamlessly handles both wet and dry ingredients, allowing you to prepare everything from finely ground spices and coffee to smooth hummus and pastes, making it a multifunctional tool for diverse culinary needs

SAFE OPERATION – Features a safety lock and non-slip feet, ensuring secure operation and stability while grinding both wet and dry ingredients, providing peace of mind and convenience during use, making it a reliable kitchen companion for daily tasks

VERSATILE GRINDER – Equipped with durable stainless-steel blades and a powerful 200W motor, it effortlessly grinds both wet and dry ingredients to the perfect consistency, ensuring efficient performance for all your kitchen needs

COMPACT GRINDER – Designed with a sleek stainless-steel housing, it features a transparent viewing window for easy monitoring, along with a convenient cable tidy for clutter-free storage, making it a stylish and practical addition to any kitchen
PEACE OF MIND – Comes with a 3-year warranty, providing long-term protection and support, subject to easy online registration
